heading: Notice of investigations and enforcement actions
label: 9c Notice of investigations and enforcement actions
text: The Commission shall provide the Securities and Exchange Commission with notice of the commencement of any proceeding and a copy of any order entered by the Commission pursuant to section 9 and 13b of this title against any futures commission merchant or introducing broker registered pursuant to , any floor broker or floor trader exempt from registration pursuant to , any associated person exempt from registration pursuant to , or any board of trade designated as a contract market pursuant to .section 6f(a)(2) of this titlesection 6f(a)(3) of this titlesection 6k(6) of this titlesection 7b–1 of this title
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of subsec. (g) of section 6 of act . Subsecs. (a) and (b) of section 6 are classified to . Subsec. (c) of section 6 is classified to . Subsecs. (d), (e), and (f) of section 6 are classified to sections 13b, 9a, and 9b of this title, respectively.Sept. 21, 1922section 8 of this titlesection 9 of this title
